Feedback? Ideas? Complaints? Suggestions? Request for report about other area? send me a message!
This page was generated using data obtained on 2022-12-04. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Remember to check whatever edit makes sense! All reports are at this page because this tasks require human judgment to verify whatever proposed edit makes sense.

wikipedia tag links to 404
Wikipedia article linked from OSM object using wikipedia tag is missing.
Often article was moved without leaving redirect and wikipedia tag should be edited to point to the new one.
Article may be deleted and no longer existing, or link was never valid. In such cases wikipedia tag should be deleted.

возера Несьпіш - an affected OSM element that may be improved


Траецкае прадмесьце - an affected OSM element that may be improved


вуліца Касманаўтаў - an affected OSM element that may be improved


Лібава-Роменская вуліца - an affected OSM element that may be improved


вуліца Касманаўтаў - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( relation(300880)['wikipedia'='be:Несьпіш']; relation(9601730)['wikipedia'='be:Траецкае прадмесьце']; way(339349379)['wikipedia'='ru:Улица Космонавтов (Минск)']; way(60520237)['wikipedia'='ru:Либаво-Роменская улица (Минск)']; way(914927840)['wikipedia'='ru:Улица Космонавтов (Минск)']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia tag links to 404']

should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking to a battle
linked wikidata entry (Q555839) is about a battle, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* or subject:wikipedia tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to remove wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
Сражение на Березине - an affected OSM element that may be improved

linked wikidata entry (Q2011225) is about a battle, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* or subject:wikipedia tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to remove wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
Мемарыяльны камень на месцы бітвы 1660 г. - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(2788679898)['wikipedia'='be:Бітва на Бярэзіне']; node(4266013189)['wikidata'='Q2011225']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking to a battle']


should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking to a film
linked wikidata entry (Q1964549) is about a film, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* or subject:wikipedia tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to remove wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - wikipedia points to disambiguation page and wikidata does not
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed
article claims to point to disambig, wikidata does not. wikidata tag is likely to be correct, wikipedia tag almost certainly is not
Галынец - an affected OSM element that may be improved

article claims to point to disambig, wikidata does not. wikidata tag is likely to be correct, wikipedia tag almost certainly is not

возера Валова - an affected OSM element that may be improved
